text.tspan: Moving average case fatality rate of COVID-19 vs. vaccination coverage,
This moving-average CFR is calculated as the ratio between the 7-day-average of the number of deaths and the
7-day-average of the number of cases 10 days earlier.
Source: Johns Hopkins University CSSE COVID-19 Data – Last updated 24 September, 10:03 (London time), Official data collated by Our World
in Data – Last updated 24 September 2021, 14:00 (London time)
